message:
fix: add source_path index and fix test isolation in db module

- Add idx_sessions_source index on sessions(source_path) for ingestion lookups
- Reset _db singleton via closeDb() in test afterEach to prevent cross-test leakage
- Remove manual db.close() calls from individual tests (afterEach handles it)
- Fix getDb test to call getDb() without path arg to actually test the singleton path
